title: cooperia drummondii var. chlorosolen
intro: Cooperia drummondii var. chlorosolen, also known as Yellow False Heather, is a flowering plant species in the heath family, Ericaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant's medicinal properties have been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as skin problems and wounds. Cooperia drummondii var. chlorosolen can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal benefits.
